2606.30518.title: Regime-Aware Peer Specialization for Robust RAG under Heterogeneous Knowledge Conflicts
2606.30518.paper_summary: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) improves language models by grounding generation in external context. However, it can be fragile when the retrieved context conflicts with the model's parametric knowledge. Such conflicts span a reliability spectrum, ranging from reliable and partially reliable evidence to adversarial context. Existing remedies often handle such heterogeneous conflicts with regime-agnostic supervision, which can conflate incompatible learning signals across reliability regimes. To disentangle these signals, we propose RAPS-DA, a regime-aware peer specialization framework that addresses conflict at two complementary granularities. At the sample level, conflicts are divided into three regimes, including Grounding, Arbitration, and Resistance, with one same-scale peer specialist trained per regime from a shared base model. Each sample is then hard-routed to its regime-matched peer for on-policy reverse-KL supervision. At the token level, a dual-layer selector uses inter-teacher disagreement, student-teacher divergence, and student entropy to filter uninformative or unstable tokens, upweight confidently misaligned ones, and gradually focus supervision on high-conflict tokens as the student matures. Gains stem from specialization at a fixed model scale, not from a stronger teacher, and the peer specialists exist only during training, so the deployed student requires no regime labels or peer access. Experiments on five conflict scenarios and two out-of-distribution benchmarks show RAPS-DA surpasses all prompting, decoding, fine-tuning, RL, and single-teacher baselines.
2606.30518.paper_summary_zh: 檢索增強生成（RAG）通過將生成與外部上下文相結合來改善語言模型。<lb/>然而，當檢索的上下文與模型的參數知識發生衝突時，它可能會變得脆弱。<lb/>這些衝突跨越了一個可靠性光譜，從可靠和部分可靠的證據到對抗性上下文。<lb/>現有的解決方案通常使用與體系無關的監督來處理這些異質衝突，這可能會混淆不同可靠性體系之間的不兼容學習信號。<lb/>為了解開這些信號，我們提出了RAPS-DA，一個體系感知的同行專業化框架，該框架在兩個互補的粒度上解決衝突。<lb/>在樣本層面，衝突被劃分為三個體系，包括基礎、仲裁和抵抗，並從共享的基模型中為每個體系訓練一個相同規模的同行專家。<lb/>然後，每個樣本被硬性路由到其體系匹配的同行以進行政策內的反向KL監督。<lb/>在標記層面，雙層選擇器使用教師之間的不一致、學生與教師之間的差異以及學生熵來過濾無信息或不穩定的標記，增強自信地錯位的標記，並隨著學生的成熟逐漸將監督重點放在高衝突的標記上。<lb/>增益來自於在固定模型規模下的專業化，而不是來自於更強的教師，並且同行專家僅在訓練期間存在，因此部署的學生不需要體系標籤或同行訪問。<lb/>在五個衝突場景和兩個分佈外基準上的實驗顯示，RAPS-DA超越了所有提示、解碼、微調、強化學習和單教師基線。
2606.30518.author: Bo Wang et.al.
2606.30518.authors: Bo Wang, Heyan Huang, Yaolin Li, Yanghao Zhou, Jiahao Teng, Ziyi Yang, Ge Shi, Chong Feng
